use_cases: Displaying status labels on cards or list items
Showing category tags on content items
Indicating notification counts or feature badges
Highlighting feature flags or special status indicators
Labeling UI elements with metadata information
ai_summary: A lightweight Badge component with rounded pill styling and four color variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) built with class-variance-authority. Designed for displaying labels, status indicators, and metadata across various interface contexts. Minimal, flat visual style suitable for any design system.
